title: Actionable SEO Tips and Strategies That Work

## Video
Your source for all things search engine optimization (SEO), including breaking news, algorithm updates, guides, strategies, tactics, tips, trends, tools, and more!
AI visibility tools count citations. Citations aren’t recommendations. Here’s what to measure instead, and why the gap keeps widening.
Google’s Mueller explained how an “are you a bot” screen can push a site’s pages out of Google, and get another site picked as canonical.
Google’s NotebookLM rebrand may expose websites to more AI scraping with zero attribution unless site owners take action right now.
Apple Maps ads ban home services, crypto ATMs, and bail bonds. Learn which businesses qualify and how advertisers can prepare for the rollout.
Google rolls out Search Console reports for social posts, updates product markup guidance, and warns against building separate markdown pages for AI.
Google’s John Mueller says that overall site quality is more than just text. How users experience the page can define quality, too.
A contract built around activity always rewards more activity. Here’s how to renegotiate your agency SOW around judgment and verified revenue instead.
Learn why Reddit is essential for AI citation strategies. Discover how it impacts search visibility and business recommendations.
The fingerprint you pressed into Google’s ranking systems now feeds the AI answers on top of them. Here’s where it persists and goes dark.
AI SEO that prioritizes content that is specific may be a key to getting cited by AI search engines.
The new Search Console social tracking hides AI click loss and turns your verified profiles into free training data for Google’s models.
CRO pages and SEO pages have different jobs. Define each page’s purpose, set boundaries, and both traffic and revenue can grow.
By Harry Clarkson-Bennett
Long doesn’t mean valuable. Google normalizes for length. Here’s what its information gain patent says actually moves the needle.
Google’s Mueller says long A/B tests won’t result in SEO demotions, contradicting official guidance that says they may be considered deceptive.
John Mueller responded to a plan to hide homepage links from Google in hopes only one internal anchor text would count, known as “first-link priority.”
Gain valuable insights on search attention and learn how to track performance beyond traditional click metrics in our new podcast episode.
Mass programmatic AI content breaks Google’s crawl ecosystem and indexing thresholds in ways most teams never anticipate until rankings collapse.
Do individuals hold all the power in publishing now? Why the reverse halo effect is reshaping content strategy for every brand in search.
Want to win the AI citation game? Build for the click-through moment, not just the citation. Here’s where to start.
Overwhelmed by agentic web acronyms? Map each protocol to the problem it solves before deciding which ones deserve your attention.
WebMCP gives AI agents named tools to call, and a clean route for prompt injection. Here’s what Chrome says to lock down first.
AI visibility numbers move between runs, so a single reading can mislead. A new paper offers a stopping rule for when rankings are finally trustworthy.
Google updated its canonicalization troubleshooting guide with new guidance on how long pages can stay in a duplicate cluster after you fix the content.
Some Google Business Profile dashboards show “no reviews yet” even though public review counts remain visible on the live listing.
Google rolls out Search Console reports for social posts, updates product markup guidance, and warns against building separate markdown pages for AI.
Most enterprise brands are invisible to AI models right now. That gap is closing fast, and the brands moving first will hold the ground.
For website owners chasing AI visibility: LLMs.txt answers who you are. WebMCP answers what your site can do.
Source bias, retrieval collapse, model collapse: three documented mechanisms that explain AI search’s strangest behavior, and where to place your bet.
Google’s new Category and Sale Duration structured data properties give merchants a way to rank more precise product data.
